```](#)# Creating your file...This may take a few minutes. Thanks for your patience.CancelYour file is readyOKIf you are using Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) to access ONTAP S3 buckets, you must remove it before you revert from ONTAP 9.16.1.Learn more about [reverting ONTAP clusters with using CORS](../s3-config/cors-integration.html#upgrading-and-reverting).
